positive: A central, stylized composition featuring overlapping celestial flora: detailed, ornate moonflowers, crystalline ferns, and bioluminescent cosmic tendrils. The style is highly intricate Art Nouveau mixed with modern minimalist cosmic geometry. Emphasis on strong, clean black and white silhouettes against a limited, deep indigo and faded gold color palette. The lighting should be dramatic and ethereal, creating deep shadows and glowing edges for high contrast suitable for apparel printing. Perfect symmetry and centered composition. Isolated on a plain background.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low detail, cropped, jpeg artifacts, signature, logo, messy, smudged, abstract chaos, human figure
